title: adiabaticFlash operation
description: Operation block of a two-phase flash with an outer Newton loop on T so that the energy balance closes.  Credo-pure: hardware = outlet pressure only.  An adiabatic flash has Q == 0 by definition; if you want heat addition, chain a `heater` upstream.  T_out, V/F and the regime are RESULTS, not specs.

P.title: Outlet pressure
P.description: Pressure at which the flash is solved.
